query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('contacts', 'deals', 'activities', 'prospects', 'ghost_sequences', 'migration_jobs', 'smtp_accounts') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3REGGwCEMbpiL33.root --database mLLZEfmfSEuH47dfeJgVGY --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('contacts', 'deals', 'activities', 'prospects', 'ghost_sequences', 'migration_jobs', 'smtp_accounts') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION LIMIT 20;
